caption: DNS Resource Record
description: The DNS Resource Record object represents a single resource record as defined in RFC 1035. It is used in the Answer, Authority, and Additional sections of a DNS message.
name: dns_resource_record

class.caption: Resource Record Class
class.description: The class of DNS data contained in this resource record. See RFC 1035. For example: IN.

hostname.description: The owner name of the resource record. For example: www.example.com.

type.caption: Resource Record Type
type.description: The type of data contained in this resource record. See RFC 1035. For example: CNAME.
